posts.text:
People suck...in general, and this platform features the worst of us. Max was excellent and persians must lead the charge vs regime!


Melody (@MelodyOCLA)

Dude - people leaving ignorant comments — seriously ? A person comes to speak about Persians and Iranians in a beautiful way and people have to criticize them like he doesn’t know what he’s talking about because he’s a comedian? He is still Persian raised by Persian parents.



— https://nitter.net/MelodyOCLA/status/2035185308283940950#m

America is nothing like the regime...the world is safer without extreme Islamism. And the shooting  of the 2 citizens and the arrest of the man below and Georgia fort are closer to what the regime is about than what America is supposed to be


Defiant L’s (@DefiantLs)

Don Lemon: "We are saying that Iran shoots protesters. Well, so do we ... that makes us no better than them

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/DefiantLs/status/2035159460940062814#m

Something does not make sense about this war in Iran. We already won says the president but what is winning here? And who and what is losing out at home?

Video
If you disagree with this...please let the rest of know so we can identify who needs to go :) instagram.com/reel/DV1sQo5Dv…

No doubt the islamist regime is poison...world better without them. Question is do we know america will make it really netter there or for us? And at what cost?


Eyal Yakoby (@EYakoby)

Cenk Uygur? Silent.

Ana Kasparian? Silent.

Mehdi Hasan? Silent.

Francesca Albanese? Silent.

Greta Thunberg? Silent.



— https://nitter.net/EYakoby/status/2034790367644500286#m

Where is your empathy for the victims of your algorithm?


Elon Musk (@elonmusk)

Have empathy for the victims, not those who inflict pain on others



— https://nitter.net/elonmusk/status/2034942668506374366#m

Free for all Friday on Cuomo Mornings on @siriusxm. Call in now to make your witness.

Call - 866-967-6887

We’re focusing on the wrong things.  

tiktok.com/@christophercuomo…

I speak with Cameron Khansarinia, Chief of Staff to Reza Pahlavi -- the exiled son of Iran's last Shah -- about what could happen if the current regime falls and why the question of who comes next is so complicated.

Join The Chris Cuomo Project on YouTube for ad-free episodes, early releases, exclusive access to Chris, and more: piped.video/sQQqtmjYqCI

Video

See the game.


Eyal Yakoby (@EYakoby)

Just three months ago, Joe Kent laid out on Shawn Ryan’s show just how much of an enemy and threat Iran is.

Suddenly, when he gets to go on a bunch of podcasts, everything changes.

The grift is insane.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/EYakoby/status/2034416127959281880#m

Not a loophole...the law. Citizen's United is the Plessy (separate but equal) scotus case of our time. It must change. @Scaramucci  is right.


Melanie D'Arrigo (@DarrigoMelanie)

The maximum an individual can legally donate to a candidate in an election is $3300.

Elon donated $277M to Trump in 2024 because of loopholes rich people use to buy elections.

If you care about election integrity — overturn Citizens United so our elections aren’t auctions.





— https://nitter.net/DarrigoMelanie/sta

What?


Citizens for Ethics (@CREWcrew)

Trump cabinet members have directed at least $30 million to Trump through political contributions, property visits, stock holdings, and donations. 

Who are they serving, Trump or the American people?
citizensforethics.org/report…




— https://nitter.net/CREWcrew/status/2034404732953846179#m

Why does the algorithm reward agit-prop? Why is that legal?


AG (@AGHamilton29)

Missed this…

Tucker says “you saw the Israelis blow up Qatar’s natural gas fields today”

It was an Islamic Republic missile attack. This is the 3rd or 4th time in a week where Tucker falsely blames Israel for an IRGC attack on a gulf state.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/AGHamilton29/status/2034597819147759793#m
